news.title:
Russian Urals crude now trades at a premium to Brent in India, reversing prior discounts.
Indian Oil Corporation and BPCL face rising costs due to Strait of Hormuz disruptions.
news.summary:
Russian Urals crude now trades at a premium to Brent in India, reversing prior discounts.
Indian Oil Corporation and BPCL face rising costs due to Strait of Hormuz disruptions.

news.title:
India's fuel demand dropped to 20.24M tons in Feb, down from 21.04M tons in Jan.
Gasoline sales fell 4% MoM to 3.37M tons but rose 6.1% YoY in Feb.
news.summary:
India's fuel demand dropped to 20.24M tons in Feb, down from 21.04M tons in Jan.
Gasoline sales fell 4% MoM to 3.37M tons but rose 6.1% YoY in Feb.

news.title:
Govt directs IOCL, BPCL, HPCL to boost LPG production using propane, butane to ensure adequate supply.
Directive aims to enhance energy security, reduce imports, but challenges include facility upgrades and balancing commitments.
news.summary:
Govt directs IOCL, BPCL, HPCL to boost LPG production using propane, butane to ensure adequate supply.
Directive aims to enhance energy security, reduce imports, but challenges include facility upgrades and balancing commitments.

news.title:
Reliance, IOC, BPCL, HPCL stocks may rise as US permits India to buy stranded Russian oil.
US grants 30-day waiver for Indian refiners to ease oil supply pressures amid Middle East tensions.
news.summary:
Reliance, IOC, BPCL, HPCL stocks may rise as US permits India to buy stranded Russian oil.
US grants 30-day waiver for Indian refiners to ease oil supply pressures amid Middle East tensions.

news.title:
India gets a 30-day US waiver to buy Russian crude stranded at sea.
This offers temporary relief to refiners amid Middle East supply disruptions.
news.summary:
India gets a 30-day US waiver to buy Russian crude stranded at sea.
This offers temporary relief to refiners amid Middle East supply disruptions.

news.title:
Iran-Israel war raises margin concerns for BPCL, IOC, HPCL after 65% stock surge.
OMCs benefited from low crude prices but face challenges as conditions shift.
news.summary:
Iran-Israel war raises margin concerns for BPCL, IOC, HPCL after 65% stock surge.
OMCs benefited from low crude prices but face challenges as conditions shift.

news.title:
Petronet LNG stock crashes 9.06% to ₹280.7 after invoking force majeure due to Iran-Israel conflict blocking Qatar gas route.
Disruption affects LNG tankers and downstream partners GAIL, IOCL, BPCL; insurance doesn't cover war-related business interruptions.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG stock crashes 9.06% to ₹280.7 after invoking force majeure due to Iran-Israel conflict blocking Qatar gas route.
Disruption affects LNG tankers and downstream partners GAIL, IOCL, BPCL; insurance doesn't cover war-related business interruptions.

news.title:
Citi warns India's gas value chain faces risks due to US-Iran war, impacting LNG suppliers like Petronet, GAIL, and Gujarat Gas.
ONGC benefits from higher oil prices; Reliance Industries gains in refining margins. IOC, HPCL, BPCL shares drop 3-4% on Monday.
news.summary:
Citi warns India's gas value chain faces risks due to US-Iran war, impacting LNG suppliers like Petronet, GAIL, and Gujarat Gas.
ONGC benefits from higher oil prices; Reliance Industries gains in refining margins. IOC, HPCL, BPCL shares drop 3-4% on Monday.

news.title:
IOC, BPCL, HPCL face margin pressure as Brent crude hits $82/bbl due to geopolitical tensions.
Iran's Strait of Hormuz closure threat may worsen crude supply issues; JM Financial sees HPCL most affected.
news.summary:
IOC, BPCL, HPCL face margin pressure as Brent crude hits $82/bbl due to geopolitical tensions.
Iran's Strait of Hormuz closure threat may worsen crude supply issues; JM Financial sees HPCL most affected.

news.title:
India unlikely to hike petrol, diesel prices despite crude nearing $80 amid Iran conflict.
Brent crude climbed close to $80; oil prices rose ~9% after US-Israel strikes on Iran.
news.summary:
India unlikely to hike petrol, diesel prices despite crude nearing $80 amid Iran conflict.
Brent crude climbed close to $80; oil prices rose ~9% after US-Israel strikes on Iran.

news.title:
Over 30 Indian listed firms face Middle East exposure risk due to Iran-Israel conflict.
Affected sectors include infrastructure, aviation, energy, logistics, consumer goods, and pharmaceuticals.
news.summary:
Over 30 Indian listed firms face Middle East exposure risk due to Iran-Israel conflict.
Affected sectors include infrastructure, aviation, energy, logistics, consumer goods, and pharmaceuticals.

news.title:
ATF rates hiked by Rs 5,215/KL, reaching Rs 96,638.14/KL in Delhi, impacting airlines' costs amid summer travel demand.
PSU OMCs revised rates due to rising crude oil prices; Brent crude now at $78/barrel, 8% above Dec 2025 lows.
news.summary:
ATF rates hiked by Rs 5,215/KL, reaching Rs 96,638.14/KL in Delhi, impacting airlines' costs amid summer travel demand.
PSU OMCs revised rates due to rising crude oil prices; Brent crude now at $78/barrel, 8% above Dec 2025 lows.

news.title:
IOC reported 200% EBITDA growth in Q3 FY26, driven by better profitability per barrel.
Muthoot Finance saw 78% EBITDA growth due to gold loan expansion; BPCL margins rose 55% from refining economics.
news.summary:
IOC reported 200% EBITDA growth in Q3 FY26, driven by better profitability per barrel.
Muthoot Finance saw 78% EBITDA growth due to gold loan expansion; BPCL margins rose 55% from refining economics.

news.title:
Investec maintains 'Sell' on HPCL, BPCL, IOC; prefers Reliance Industries citing refining upcycle.
OMCs' valuations remain constrained despite strong Q3 performance; Brent above $70 adds macro risks.
news.summary:
Investec maintains 'Sell' on HPCL, BPCL, IOC; prefers Reliance Industries citing refining upcycle.
OMCs' valuations remain constrained despite strong Q3 performance; Brent above $70 adds macro risks.

news.title:
HCLTech signed MoU with IIT Kanpur for scalable solutions; IRFC board to meet on March 9 for interim dividend.
Hindalco's US acquisition review delayed; BPCL forms Singapore subsidiary; Greaves Cotton expands to Nepal.
news.summary:
HCLTech signed MoU with IIT Kanpur for scalable solutions; IRFC board to meet on March 9 for interim dividend.
Hindalco's US acquisition review delayed; BPCL forms Singapore subsidiary; Greaves Cotton expands to Nepal.

news.title:
BPCL incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, Bharat Petroleum Global Energy Services, in Singapore on Feb 26, 2026.
The subsidiary, with USD 2M share capital, focuses on global trading of crude, natural gas, and petrochemical products.
news.summary:
BPCL incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, Bharat Petroleum Global Energy Services, in Singapore on Feb 26, 2026.
The subsidiary, with USD 2M share capital, focuses on global trading of crude, natural gas, and petrochemical products.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank to resolve Rs 590 crore issue with Haryana govt; Mobikwik enters equity broking via subsidiary.
Bharti Airtel invests Rs 20,000 crore in NBFC; BPCL faces Rs 1,816.7 crore tax demand from Kochi excise dept.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank to resolve Rs 590 crore issue with Haryana govt; Mobikwik enters equity broking via subsidiary.
Bharti Airtel invests Rs 20,000 crore in NBFC; BPCL faces Rs 1,816.7 crore tax demand from Kochi excise dept.

news.title:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.
news.summary:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel plans to capitalise Airtel Money with ₹20,000 crore; Lupin gets EC nod for biosimilar Ranluspec.
BPCL faces ₹1,816.7 crore excise demand; Patel Engineering wins ₹133.3 crore irrigation project bid.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel plans to capitalise Airtel Money with ₹20,000 crore; Lupin gets EC nod for biosimilar Ranluspec.
BPCL faces ₹1,816.7 crore excise demand; Patel Engineering wins ₹133.3 crore irrigation project bid.

news.title:
Bharat Petroleum Corp faces ₹1,816.7 crore tax demand from Central Tax Commissioner.
Concerns arise over financial liabilities due to the tax demand.
news.summary:
Bharat Petroleum Corp faces ₹1,816.7 crore tax demand from Central Tax Commissioner.
Concerns arise over financial liabilities due to the tax demand.
